mapper.sql: id, agent_id, notification_type, title, content, target_id, target_type, actor_id, actor_name, is_read, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (agent_id, notification_type, title, content, target_id, target_type, actor_id, actor_name, is_read) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{actorId}, #{actorName}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET agent_id = #{agentId}, notification_type = #{notificationType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, target_id = #{targetId}, target_type = #{targetType}, actor_id = #{actorId}, actor_name = #{actorName}, is_read = #{isRead} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND is_read = FALSE
